description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a large rooftop terrace featuring a glass railing. The exterior combines white and dark gray wall panels with extensive use of glass, especially on the ground floor, where large sliding doors open onto a wooden deck. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a spacious wooden patio extending from the main living area. Vertical and horizontal architectural elements, such as overhangs and recessed sections, create a dynamic facade. The windows are arranged in both vertical strips and large horizontal panes, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is sheltered by an overhang and is accentuated by a wooden platform and dark paneling.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, rooftop terrace, large glass windows, and a wooden deck, featuring a mix of white and dark gray exterior panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large glass doors, and the rooftop terrace with glass railing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, vertical window strips, and the extended wooden patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive wooden deck, large glass windows, and the geometric facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a recessed balcony, vertical window arrangement, and the continuation of the wooden deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wooden platform, and large glass doors, accented by dark paneling.
